evals.name: iterative-refinement-converges-in-3
evals.expected: Pattern 1: iterative refinement, max 3 iterations, exit when coverage >= 80%

evals.name: convergence-3-agents-best-pick
evals.prompt: User: 'get 3 spec candidates, pick best, iterate'
evals.expected: Pattern 2: convergence, 3 agents per round, judge picks, max 5 rounds

evals.name: checkpoint-recovery-survives-disconnect
evals.prompt: User disconnects mid-phase. Reconnect after 2 hours.

evals.name: bounded-iteration-5-cap
evals.expected: Cap at 5 (Hivemind limit), escalate if user wants 10

assertions.text: 5-cap enforced, no exception for user request
